# teams2 config default-bot-location

Default bot location for app create (bf or azure)

## Usage

```
teams2 config default-bot-location [value]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `value` | Set to 'bf' or 'azure'. Omit to show current value or pick interactively. | No |
